## Checklist

- [ ] File references in SKILL.md are one level deep (`references/filename.md`, not `references/subdir/filename.md`)
- [ ] SKILL.md body stays under 500 lines
- [ ] Any new claims are sourced (research citation or explicit "practitioner consensus" label)
- [ ] No fabricated examples, credentials, or citations introduced
- [ ] Tested locally by triggering the skill in a Claude Code session
